message:
chore: expand .gitignore to cover all ephemeral multi-agent artifacts

Add patterns for ephemeral files and directories that accumulate from
concurrent Codex/Claude Code agents working on the project simultaneously.
These were previously showing up in git status as untracked noise:

- .cargo-home*/ — per-agent cargo registry/home directories
- .cargo-target*/ — per-agent cargo build target directories
- .bench*/ — benchmark result directories from perf profiling
- .tmp_* — extend existing .tmp_ pattern to cover files (not just dirs)
- _tmp-*/, _tmp_*/ — underscore-prefixed Codex isolation sandboxes
- tmp_link, tmp_probe* — agent probe/scratch files
- fuzz/corpus/, fuzz/target/ — libfuzzer build artifacts and corpus data
- proptest-regressions/ — proptest shrink/regression artifacts
- *.root_full_recovery, *.empty_recovery — crash recovery backup files

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,16 +33,38 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 .codex_space_probe
 .tmp-*/
 .tmp-*
-.tmp_*/
+.tmp_*
 .white_deer_target/
 tmp_*/
+tmp_link
+tmp_probe*
+_tmp-*/
+_tmp_*/
+
+# Per-agent cargo home directories (Codex/concurrent agents)
+.cargo-home*/
 
 # Per-agent cargo target directories
+.cargo-target*/
 .target-*/
 .target_*/
 _target_*/
 _target-*/
 
+# Benchmark result directories
+.bench*/
+
+# Fuzz build artifacts and corpus data
+fuzz/corpus/
+fuzz/target/
+
+# Proptest regression artifacts
+proptest-regressions/
+
+# Recovery backup files (from crash recovery)
+*.root_full_recovery
+*.empty_recovery
+
 # Session export snapshots
 pi-session-*.html
